svg.text: 37 skills · 5 domains · The calls that separate a PM who's been in the room from one who's read about the room
Every skill includes a WHEN WRONG section — the conditions under which the advice fails

g.text: When should AI act, not answer?
Can't measure it? Don't ship it
All 37 skills import from Layer 1 (Thinking) before executing · No circular dependencies across plugins · Each is independently installable
